tools.name: search_beaches
tools.description: Find public beaches by city or consented coordinates and rank them for swimming, family, warm-water, low-wind, surf, accessibility or amenities. Returns compact results with BeachFinder links.

tools.name: search_swim_spots
tools.description: Find beaches, lakes, bathing places and public swimming locations. Current conditions are fetched only for the highest-ranked results.

tools.name: search_surf_spots
tools.description: Find mapped swimming locations with surf or wave relevance and current planning signals when available.

tools.name: search_dive_snorkel_spots
tools.description: Find mapped diving and snorkeling locations without inferring visibility or safety.

tools.name: search_river_whitewater_spots
tools.description: Find mapped river and whitewater activity locations near a destination.

tools.name: search_vanlife_spots
tools.description: Find published van and camping locations near beaches while withholding direct contact details.

tools.name: search_activity_providers
tools.description: Find BeachFinder water and coastal activity providers for lessons, rentals, equipment, repair needs, guided trips, clubs, campsites and excursions. Results state whether each profile is owner verified, source backed or mapped, and return only name, category, approximate location and BeachFinder prof

tools.name: search_guides
tools.description: Find localized practical, destination, GTA and football travel guides published by BeachFinder.

tools.name: get_spot_details
tools.description: Get stable public facts and localized editorial content for one BeachFinder spot ID.

tools.name: get_spot_conditions
tools.description: Get current water, weather, wind, UV, wave and current planning signals for one BeachFinder spot ID.

tools.name: get_community_conditions
tools.description: Get an anonymous aggregate of active BeachFinder community reports for one spot. No user identity is returned.

tools.name: compare_spots
tools.description: Compare two to five explicit BeachFinder spot IDs using only documented facts and current available conditions.
